title: What Happens After Stopping Ozempic

source.title: This is what happens when you stop taking Ozempic

segments.title: Opening Question
segments.audioText: Ozempic, it is literally the hottest drug in the country right now, but what happens when you stop taking it?
segments.transcript: Ozempic, it is literally the hottest drug in the country right now, but what happens when you stop taking it?
segments.translationZh: Ozempic 而家可以話係全國最熱門嘅藥，但如果你停用，會發生咩事？

points.label: literally the hottest drug
points.explanationZh: literally 加強語氣；the hottest drug 指『最熱門、最多人講嘅藥』。

points.label: right now
points.explanationZh: right now 放句尾，表示『而家、目前』。

points.label: what happens when...
points.explanationZh: 新聞常用問題開場；when 後面接情況：當你停用嘅時候。

segments.title: Drug Class
segments.audioText: Ozempic is part of a class of medications called GLP-1 agonists.
segments.transcript: Ozempic is part of a class of medications called GLP-1 agonists.
segments.translationZh: Ozempic 屬於一類叫 GLP-1 受體促效劑嘅藥物。

points.label: is part of
points.explanationZh: is part of 即係『屬於……一部分』，用嚟分類。

points.label: a class of medications
points.explanationZh: a class of medications 指『一類藥物』，聽醫療新聞好常見。

points.label: called GLP-1 agonists
points.explanationZh: called 後面係名稱；唔使完全明醫學詞，都要聽到佢係分類名。

segments.title: How It Works
segments.audioText: These medications are generally well tolerated, but one of the ways in which they work is by slowing the emptying of the stomach.
segments.transcript: These medications are generally well tolerated, but one of the ways in which they work is by slowing the emptying of the stomach.
segments.translationZh: 呢類藥一般都算容易耐受，但其中一個作用方式係減慢胃部排空。

points.label: generally well tolerated
points.explanationZh: generally 即『一般嚟講』；well tolerated 指身體通常承受到。

points.label: one of the ways
points.explanationZh: one of the ways 表示『其中一個方式』，後面會講作用機制。

points.label: by slowing the emptying
points.explanationZh: by + ing 講方法；slowing the emptying 即『減慢排空』。

segments.title: Results Vary
segments.audioText: It's not one size fits all, and individual results and long-term results will tend to vary.
segments.transcript: It's not one size fits all, and individual results and long-term results will tend to vary.
segments.translationZh: 呢件事唔係一個方法適合所有人，個人結果同長期結果都會有差異。

points.label: not one size fits all
points.explanationZh: 固定講法，意思係『唔係人人都一樣適用』。

points.label: individual results
points.explanationZh: individual results 指每個人自己嘅結果。

points.label: will tend to vary
points.explanationZh: tend to 表示『傾向於』；vary 係有變化、有差別。

segments.title: Weight Regain
segments.audioText: It is possible, if not likely, that the person will regain some or all or even more of the weight that they've lost.
segments.transcript: It is possible, if not likely, that the person will regain some or all or even more of the weight that they've lost.
segments.translationZh: 呢個人有可能，甚至好可能，會重新增返部分、全部，甚至超過之前減走嘅體重。

points.label: possible, if not likely
points.explanationZh: if not likely 係補強語氣：唔止可能，甚至幾有可能。

points.label: regain some or all
points.explanationZh: regain 係『重新得到、增返』；some or all 指部分或者全部。

points.label: the weight that they've lost
points.explanationZh: that they've lost 係關係子句，補充係之前減走嘅體重。

sentences: Ozempic, it is literally the hottest drug in the country right now, but what happens when you stop taking it?
Ozempic is part of a class of medications called GLP-1 agonists.
These medications are generally well tolerated, but one of the ways in which they work is by slowing the emptying of the stomach.
It's not one size fits all, and individual results and long-term results will tend to vary.
It is possible, if not likely, that the person will regain some or all or even more of the weight that they've lost.

vocabulary.example: Ozempic is part of a class of medications.

vocabulary.translationZh: GLP-1 受體促效劑可以影響食慾。

vocabulary.meaningZh: 可耐受嘅；身體承受到嘅
vocabulary.example: These medications are generally well tolerated.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢類藥一般都算容易耐受。

vocabulary.example: The drug slows the emptying of the stomach.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢種藥會減慢胃部排空。

vocabulary.example: Individual results will tend to vary.
Long-term results will tend to vary.
The person may regain some of the weight.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢個人可能會增返部分體重。

phrases.phrase: the hottest drug in the country
phrases.example: Ozempic is literally the hottest drug in the country right now.

phrases.phrase: part of a class of medications
phrases.example: Ozempic is part of a class of medications called GLP-1 agonists.
These medications are generally well tolerated.
It's not one size fits all.

phrases.phrase: regain some or all of the weight
phrases.meaningZh: 增返部分或者全部體重
phrases.example: The person may regain some or all of the weight.

speakingPractice.prompt: 由 00:00 跟讀開場問題，留意 hottest drug / right now / stop taking it 三個重音。
speakingPractice.example: Ozempic, it is literally the hottest drug in the country right now, but what happens when you stop taking it?

speakingPractice.prompt: 重播 00:09，先寫低 is part of，再聽 a class of medications called...。
speakingPractice.example: Ozempic is part of a class of medications called GLP-1 agonists.

speakingPractice.prompt: 模仿 01:35 嘅語氣，用 It's not one size fits all 開一句關於健康建議嘅句子。
speakingPractice.example: It's not one size fits all, and individual needs will vary.

speakingPractice.prompt: 用兩句英文複述：Ozempic 屬於咩藥？停用之後可能有咩情況？
speakingPractice.example: Ozempic is part of a class of medications called GLP-1 agonists. If someone stops taking it, they may regain some of the weight.

notes: 先用 00:00 開場問題做盲聽，聽到 but what happens when... 就停一停，估下一句方向。
醫學名詞 GLP-1 agonists 唔需要一次記熟；今日重點係聽清楚 called 前後嘅分類結構。
01:03 句較長，可以拆成 generally well tolerated / but one of the ways / by slowing... 三段跟讀。
最後一句用 02:17 重播兩次，特別聽 possible, if not likely 呢個補強語氣。
